//: Per-project config for the fullstack plugin (infra + app). Copy to project root as .governance.json (/fullstack:init does this).

adr.comment: dir is an ARRAY here: this plugin reads BOTH domains' folders inside the pulled ADR repo. The cache reporter scans each recursively. autoSync: DEFAULT OFF. When true, `docs/adr-cache.mjs --ensure` fast-forwards the ADR submodule to upstreamBranch BEFORE fingerprinting (fetch + `git merge --ff-only` — never rewrites the branch ref, so unpushed local commits are never orphaned; a diverged branch fails the FF and falls back to on-disk ADRs; skipped entirely when $CI is set, so headless/CI runs stay reproducible). Leave OFF to advance ADRs only when you deliberately bump the submodule pointer (recommended — an auto-advance dirties the superproject working tree, which collides with the clean-tree DoD). upstreamBranch: branch to fast-forward from. allowedWrite* only gate `aws` commands.

protected.//: Infra: IAM/network/security modules — infra security-reviewer report.
Infra: data/database modules — red team report.
Infra: self-service ADR templates/flows — consumer-reviewer report.
App: public API surface — api-reviewer report.

blockedCommands.message: Publishing a package is a human-only release step.
